name: Semantic Gene Search
description: Search for genes from a natural-language biology query by mapping the query to Gene Ontology terms and retrieving associated genes, with optional NCBI Gene enrichment.

inputs.name: query
inputs.description: Natural-language biology query, such as 'genes related to oxidative stress in yeast'.

inputs.name: max_go_terms
inputs.description: Maximum number of matched GO terms to return. Default: 5.

inputs.name: max_gene_annotations
inputs.description: Maximum number of gene annotations to return. Default: 15.

inputs.name: enrich_ncbi
inputs.description: Whether to retrieve NCBI Gene summaries for top returned genes. Default: true.

outputs.description: Structured result with parsed query, matched GO terms, gene annotations, NCBI gene records, and notes.

input.query: genes related to oxidative stress in yeast
human genes involved in DNA repair
